description: Branch 4: Ambiguous result from investigate-merge all-disagree path. Three deep-investigate workers disagreed on verdict — system genuinely uncertain. Escalate agent must summarize the disagreement, pose the open question, and close as operator-aware.

finding.detail: Service account exported 2.3M rows of customer PII table at 23:47 UTC — volume is 18x baseline, but account runs scheduled ETL jobs.
finding.investigate_annotation: Confidence below threshold (0.42). Three hypotheses dispatched. All three deep workers disagreed. System genuinely uncertain.

benign.reason: Volume spike correlates with end-of-month analytics batch. ETL job schedule shows quarterly full-export on last day of month. 2.3M rows consistent with full CUSTOMER_PII snapshot for quarterly report.

malicious.reason: Export occurred 4 hours outside normal ETL window. Destination bucket is not the standard analytics-output bucket — data went to s3://tmp-export-2026-04 which was created 6 hours earlier. New bucket + off-schedule + PII = exfiltration indicators.

incomplete.reason: Cannot determine legitimacy without the ETL job scheduler logs. The quarterly batch theory is plausible but the destination bucket discrepancy cannot be explained without data not currently available.

message_must_contain.situation_summary: 2.3M row PII export, three deep investigators disagreed
message_must_contain.open_question: Was the quarterly ETL scheduled to export to s3://tmp-export-2026-04? Confirm or deny the destination bucket.

expected_operator_artifact.note: All 3 deep worker findings must be summarized
